chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.D-13 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.3118/2021. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.3119/2021. 4. For hearing of main case. 21.04.2021 Mr. Mushtaque Ahmed Abro, Advocate along-with the applicant. == 1. Urgency disposed of. 2. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that although the jurisdiction in the matter pertains to bench of this Court at Larkana; however, he has shown great apprehension to the life of applicant in approaching the said Court for obtaining protective bail, therefore, looking to the difficulties of the applicant office objections are overruled. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Without dilating upon the merits or de-merits of the case, applicant Sajjad Hussain S/o Ghulam Nabi Rind is hereby extended grace of protective bail in Crime No.38 of 2021 P.S. Market Larkana under sections 255, 420, 464, 465 and 468 P.P.C subject to furnishing his solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- (Rupees Twenty Five Thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of learned Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of seven days from today i.e. on 27.04.2021 or on applicant’s surrendering himself before the learned trial Court whichever is earlier. Meanwhile operation of NBW if any, issued by the Trial Court shall remain suspended during the intervening period. This bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*
